name: monitor_endpoint
prompt:
Check the endpoint ${endpoint_url} and verify it responds correctly.

1. Fetch the URL and check the HTTP status code
2. Verify the response time is reasonable (< ${max_response_time}ms)
3. If ${expected_content} is set, verify the response contains it
4. Report any issues found

If everything is OK, report 'OK' with response time. If there's an issue, describe it clearly.
description: Periodically check an HTTP endpoint and alert on issues
